title: phlomoides likiangensis
intro: Phlomoides likiangensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as a type of mint. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and improving respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Phlomoides likiangensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
